formPage.createDescription: Fill in the details to register a club on the platform.
formPage.editDescription: Update the club information. Changes are reflected immediately.
formPage.toastCreateError: We couldn't register the club. Try again.
formPage.toastEditError: We couldn't update the club. Try again.
formPage.toastMissingClubId: We couldn't identify the club to update.

sections.generalDescription: Basic club details that users will see on the platform.
sections.imagesDescription: Photos of the venue that will appear on the platform. You can upload up to 5 images.
sections.locationDescription: Physical address of the venue for operations and internal references.

unsaved.title: Leave without saving?
unsaved.description: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, they will be lost.

notFound.title: We couldn't find the club you want to edit.
notFound.description: The club doesn't exist or you don't have permission to edit it.
